complications_stuck_up.pill_type: Worked pipe with rotation/reciprocation, jar attempts, s

complications_mud_loss.operation: D/Dn 8-1/2" dir hole to 3514m (TD). During POOH HLB DD assy, obsd T/Pull at 3348m, Started B/Ream & obsd pressure shoot up, high torque at 3192m. Obsd losses.

RIH clean out assy upto shoe. C&C mud, increased MW f/12.2ppg to 12.5ppg. R/Dn & W/Dn upto 3025m. Obsd D/Loss 60-80BPH @500GPM. Obsd sudden increase in D/Loss 150BPH @400GPM. POOh to shoe & prepared pill. Placed pill at 3055m. Obsd no static losses & dynamic losses (400gpm) at shoe & at 3055m while RIH .

After soak on LCM Pill#1. W/Dn f/2850m to 3055m. Obsd no losses. R/Dn upto 3150m, obsd D/L at 400gpm -100BPH. POOH to shoe & prepared LCM pill#2. Placed at 3160m. POOH to shoe, Soaked pill. Obsd no S/Loss & D/L at 400GPM-44BPH. W/Dn upto 3160m. Obsd D/L @400GPM-60-70BPH.

Soaked LCM pill#2, Obsd D/L 44BPH @400GPM at shoe. W/Dn f/2780m to 3160m, obsd D/L 60-70BPH @400GPM. R/Dn to 3178m. Obsd D/L 210BPH @400GPM. POOH 1 std & Placed LCM Pill#3 @3160m. POOH to shoe. Soaked. Checked S/L & D/L at 450GPM-Nil.

Soaked LCM pill#3, obsd no losses at shoe upto 450gpm. W/Dn upto 3178m with 300GPM, obsd no losses. R/Dn upto 3295m, obsd losses 40BPH at 3228m & graduallly increase upto 180BPH at 400GPM (3295). POOH upto 3160m, prepared pill#4 & RIH to 3190m & placed LCM pill#4. Soaked for 2 hrs, Obsd D/L at 400gpm-25BPH AT shoe & S/L-Nil.

complications_stuck_up.pill_type: Worked on string upto 620kips & 44kft-lbs, Placed Spotting fluid pill 5% 2 times & C/OUT ACID JOB TWICE
complications_stuck_up.action_taken: WOS with Max Torque (44kft-lbs & 620kips pull), placed 5% Spotting fluid pill 2 times around BHA, no success. Carried out an acid job twice & worked on a sting, but could not succeed. RIH DCST-CCL tool & C/OUT string colloidal job at 3943m. P/O drill string to surface. 187m fish left in hole.

complications_stuck_up.pill_type: Spotting fluid pill-3 times (6%-8%), Acid Job (12% Hcl+3%HF)
complications_stuck_up.action_taken: WOS with Max Torque (35kft-lbs & 550kips pull), placed 6% to 8% Spotting fluid pill 3 times around BHA, no success. Carried out acid obsd hole packoff,  carried out DCSt job 5th time at 3590m, pooh drill string to surface, RIH 12 1/4" WFD FBM to 3591.6m, tag fish top here, milled upto 3593m, carried out Cement Plug Job at 3592m declared LIH on 15.09.2025 05:00AM.

complications_well_activity.operation: while drilling at 2119, TG max -57%, wlow check well flowing
complications_well_activity.pill_type: While drilling at 2119m. Observed gas percentage, tg (max): 57% .well flowing. closed bop. Found string stalled. Released the same. Inc mud weight f/13.7ppg t/13.9ppg. Flow check negative

complications_well_activity.pill_type: Changed over to 9.3 ppg gel polymer mud Obsd well static, No activity.

drilling of 8.5" hole with sea upto 1811m, with no return, obsd sudden gas influx, Closed BOP. SICP increases to 1400psi, Bulldose the well by pumping sea water in annulus. Continously filled the well , Strip out from 1798m to 1604m. As well is having loss + gas influx, Continously filled up well, bulldose well also pumped 5 number of LCM pills & PO DD assy. RIH with 8-1/2" TCR bit+ PBL, Carried out 2 number of gel cement job,still loss continuos , no returns also gas migration, SICP increases to 1400 PSI. Bulldose well , cont filled up well & PO upto surface. RIH with 5-1/2" OEDP upto 1400 for further cement plug job.
